name: Juxtaposition of Shallow Reservoir-Triggered Seismicity and Deep Tectonic Locking in the Qiaojia-Dongchuan Seismic Gap
summary: arXiv:2607.19606v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Identifying the critical state of mature seismic gaps is challenging, especially when anthropogenic stress perturbations, such as reservoir impound...
description: arXiv:2607.19606v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Identifying the critical state of mature seismic gaps is challenging, especially when anthropogenic stress perturbations, such as reservoir impoundment, superimpose on tectonic loading. Here, utilizing a high-resolution dense array catalog from the Qiaojia-Dongchuan seismic gap (hosting the second-largest hydropower station in the world), we rev...
author: Yuxin Zhou, Huai Zhang, S. Mostafa Mousavi, Guangyao Yin, Pei He, Yicun Guo, Shuang Yi, Yaolin Shi
